title: MEA – Consultant – 2 Posts

basic_details.short_information: Ministry of External Affairs (MEA) Recruitment 2026 for 2 posts of Consultant in PP&R Division. Candidates with Post Graduate Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 01-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through MEA official website.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for MEA Consultant in PP&R Division Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
